details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest evening class as single ride
Task 2: Purchase cheapest class pack under $200 and book a class with it
Task 3: Book two classes using membership with 30+ minute gap
Task 4: Book morning class and select front-row bike
Task 5: Cancel a booked class and rebook another class
Task 6: Book weekend class with one guest using guest pass
Task 7: Subscribe to cheapest 30+ day unlimited membership and disable auto-renew
Task 8: Apply promo code to book cheapest eligible class
Task 9: Set preferences and book recommended class
